costco.note: Wholesale Club — NOT grocery on most networks. Mastercard only in-store.

walmart.note: Discount Store / General Merchandise — NOT grocery on most networks.

shoppers_drug_mart.note: Pharmacy — varies by issuer. CIBC treats as bills/other (not grocery). PC Financial has explicit 5% tier. Scotia/Amex unconfirmed.

canadian_tire.note: Auto parts / Home / General — classification varies by card network and purchase type.

loblaws.note: Supermarket. Includes Loblaws, No Frills, Real Canadian Superstore, Maxi, Provigo.

amazon_ca.note: Online retail — classified as general merchandise or book store, NOT physical retail category.

lcbo.note: Liquor store — often a separate category or falls under 'other'.
